channel.title: Security on Zero Note: Self-destructible shareable notes
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Zero Note: Self-destructible shareable notes

item.title: What Payment Information Is Safe to Share?
item.description: A practical guide to what payment information can sometimes be shared, what should be handled carefully, and what should never be shared.

item.title: When to Use Views-Based vs Time-Based Message Destruction
item.description: How to decide between view-based and time-based self-destructing messages, depending on what you are sharing.

item.title: Why You Should Never Share Your Card Number, Expiry Date, and CVV Together
item.description: Why sharing your card number, expiry date, and CVV together is risky, and what to do instead.

item.title: Best Way to Share a Password Securely Without Email or Chat
item.description: A better way to share a password without leaving it sitting in email inboxes or chat history.

item.title: How to Send Information That Should Only Be Seen Once
item.description: A simple way to share information that should only be viewed once and not remain available afterward.

item.title: How to Share a One-Time Secret Securely
item.description: A safer way to share a secret that should only be accessed once and not remain available afterward.

item.title: How to Share a Wi‑Fi Password Without Saving It Anywhere
item.description: A simple way to share a Wi‑Fi password without leaving it sitting in chat history or email.

item.title: How to Share Bank Details Securely
item.description: A safer way to share bank details without leaving them sitting in chat history or email forever.

item.title: Is It Safe to Send Bank Details by Email?
item.description: What to know before sending bank details by email, and safer ways to share them when necessary.

item.title: Why Chat Is a Bad Place for Sensitive Information
item.description: Why chat apps are often the wrong place for passwords, private details, and other sensitive information.

item.title: How to Send Temporary Instructions Securely
item.description: A simple way to share temporary instructions without leaving them sitting in chat history or email forever.

item.title: How to Share a Password Securely (Without Sending It in Chat or Email)
item.description: Stop sending passwords in chat or email. Here’s a safer way to share them without leaving them behind.

item.title: How to Share API Keys Securely (Without Slack or Email)
item.description: A safer way to share API keys without leaving them in Slack, email, or source code.

item.title: How to Share Private Information Securely
item.description: A simple way to share private information without leaving it sitting in chat history or email forever.

item.title: How to Share Sensitive Information Without Chat
item.description: A safer way to share sensitive information without leaving it sitting in chat history.

item.title: How to Send a Message That Can Only Be Opened Once
item.description: Send information that can only be accessed once and disappears after.

item.title: How to Share a Note Securely (Without Leaving a Trace)
item.description: A simpler way to share sensitive information without leaving it sitting in chat history or email forever.
